scenes.narrationText: What if you could uncover hidden fraud networks just by asking a question? YiGraph transforms how financial analysts discover critical relationships in complex data—simply describe what you need, and let AI do the rest.
scenes.visualPrompt: A futuristic digital network visualization showing interconnected nodes glowing in blue and gold, representing financial transactions and relationships, with a magnifying glass hovering over a highlighted fraud pattern

scenes.narrationText: YiGraph understands your business questions in plain English. No more writing complex Cypher queries or mastering graph syntax.
scenes.visualPrompt: A business professional typing a natural language question on a sleek laptop screen, with a speech bubble transforming into a visual graph query diagram, showing the translation from plain English to technical visualization

scenes.narrationText: Just ask: "Show me all accounts linked to this suspicious transaction within three hops." YiGraph automatically plans the analysis, executes the algorithms, and delivers clear, actionable insights.
scenes.visualPrompt: A dynamic graph visualization displaying nodes and connections expanding outward in concentric rings, highlighting a suspicious transaction in red with three-hop connections branching to related accounts in different colors

scenes.narrationText: Your data lives everywhere—CSV files, documents, spreadsheets, even academic papers. YiGraph automatically extracts entities and relationships from all these sources, building structured knowledge graphs you can query instantly.
scenes.visualPrompt: A centralized hub icon receiving data streams from multiple source icons (CSV file, document, spreadsheet, research paper) flowing into a unified connected knowledge graph network

scenes.narrationText: Built for financial services, YiGraph includes a complete anti-money laundering demo using the AMLSim1K dataset. Detect transaction patterns, identify high-risk networks, and generate compliance reports—all powered by cutting-edge graph algorithms running on NetworkX with parallel processing.
scenes.visualPrompt: A financial dashboard displaying transaction pattern analysis charts, risk indicators, and a compliance report preview, with a background visualization of interconnected high-risk network nodes highlighted in red

scenes.narrationText: Ready to transform your financial investigations? Explore YiGraph and start asking questions your data has been waiting to answer.
scenes.visualPrompt: A compelling call-to-action screen with the YiGraph logo, featuring a search bar with a cursor blinking, inviting the viewer to start asking questions
